name: Access Capital Group, INC.
description_short: Access Capital Group, Inc. (LoanGoal) is a mortgage lender offering VA, FHA, conventional, and specialty loans since 2001, with a focus on low credit score borrowers and first-time homebuyers.
description_long:
Access Capital Group, Inc. operates under the brand name LoanGoal and has been providing mortgage services since 2001. The company is NMLS-licensed (#33043) and operates through a team of nationally licensed mortgage professionals based in Arizona (602 area code). Their primary business is residential mortgage lending across multiple loan programs.

The company specializes in VA loans (including zero-down purchase options and VA IRRRL refinances), FHA loans with low credit score approval (minimum 500 credit score), and conventional loans. They also offer specialized programs including bank statement loans, jumbo loans, USDA zero-down loans, and FHA streamline refinances that require no credit score. Their online platform provides mortgage calculators, rate information, educational content, and a borrower portal for application and document management.

Access Capital Group distinguishes itself through a stated emphasis on accessibility for borrowers with challenged credit (500+ credit score thresholds) and military borrowers seeking VA financing. The company highlights personalized service with named loan officers, educational resources through their mortgage blog and newsletter, and transparent communication throughout the loan process. Customer reviews emphasize responsiveness, patience, and clear guidance during the mortgage application and closing process.

Based on website content alone, the company appears to operate primarily as a direct mortgage lender serving the consumer market. The business model relies on standard mortgage origination and retail lending practices. Reviews suggest satisfaction with customer service delivery, though no independent verification of loan approval rates, pricing competitiveness, or closing timelines is available from the website alone.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers VA loans with zero down payment and no credit score requirement for VA IRRRL refinances
FHA loans available to borrowers with minimum 500 credit score (lower than conventional standards)
Multiple loan program options including bank statement, jumbo, USDA zero-down, and conforming loans
Free online mortgage calculators for conventional, FHA, and VA loans plus VA residual income calculator
Named loan officers (Mark Christoffersen, Michael O'Connor, Cathy Zebarth cited in reviews) providing personalized service
Educational resources including mortgage blog, newsletter, VA Loan FAQs, and Ask A Professional section
Long operational history since 2001 with NMLS licensing and national lending authority
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, APRs, or loan fees for rate comparison
No transparency on loan approval rates, average closing times, or processing timelines
Limited details on debt-to-income ratio requirements or other underwriting criteria beyond credit score minimums
Customer reviews are all positive with no negative feedback visible, raising questions about review authenticity or selection bias
No information about whether company services all 50 states or has geographic limitations
best_for: First-time homebuyers with VA benefits seeking zero-down purchase loans
Borrowers with credit scores between 500-620 seeking FHA financing when conventional options are unavailable
Military servicemembers and veterans exploring VA IRRRL refinance options
Self-employed borrowers or those with non-traditional income documentation (bank statement loan program)
diagnosis: Access Capital Group is best for military borrowers seeking VA financing and borrowers with credit scores 500-620 unable to qualify for conventional loans through traditional lenders. The primary caveat is that the website lacks transparency on interest rates, fees, approval odds, and closing timelines—essential factors for comparing mortgage lenders—making it difficult to assess whether their pricing is competitive or terms are favorable relative to other options in the market.
services: VA home purchase loans with zero down payment
VA cash-out refinance loans (up to 100% of home value)
VA IRRRL (Interest Rate Reduction Refinance Loan) - no credit score required
FHA loans for low credit score borrowers (500+ credit score)
FHA streamline refinance loans (no credit score required)
Bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers
Mortgage rate calculators and qualification tools
Educational resources: mortgage blog, newsletter, FAQ sections
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 202 E Earll Dr Ste 460, Phoenix, AZ 85012
meta_description: Mortgage lender since 2001 offering VA, FHA, conventional, and specialty loans for low credit score borrowers and first-time homebuyers.
